notes.model: xAI model to use for extraction: grok-3-mini-fast (default), grok-3-fast, etc.
notes.xai_api_key: Optional: set here or via XAI_API_KEY env var. If using OpenClaw, auto-detected from openclaw.json.
notes.ingest_interval_minutes: How often the cron runs. Change this, then run: engram/update-cron.sh
notes.max_concurrent_chunks: Parallel API calls per file (higher = faster, more API usage)
